text: I feel a sense of curiosity and wonder. The modern architecture and the buzz of collective thinking in the classroom resonate with my desire for knowledge. The vibrant and meticulously designed exhibition wall about research and development amplifies my reflection on human progress and innovation. I am both an observer and participant in a space dedicated to learning and the birth of new ideas, making me feel connected to something larger than myself—a constantly evolving tapestry of thought and discovery.
